nasb.text: and that repentance for forgiveness of sins would be proclaimed in His name to all the nations, beginning from Jerusalem.

esv.text: and that repentance for  the forgiveness of sins should be proclaimed in his name to all nations, beginning from Jerusalem.

cnv.text: 人要奉他的名，傳講悔改與赦罪的道，從耶路撒冷起，直傳到萬國。

ccb.text: 人们要奉祂的名传扬悔改、赦罪的福音，从耶路撒冷一直传遍万国。

csbs.text: 并且人要奉他的名宣讲为罪得赦免的悔改，从耶路撒冷开始，直到万国。
